subcodes.first_line: In this station We make mention of them who hearkened unto Our call, turned their faces unto Our countenance, attained in Our days, and ascended unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر فى هذا المقام من سمع ندائى و اقبل الى وجهى و فاز فى ایامى و صعد الى
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @naming of children; of individuals
